execute_steps: Unit test 'AC-1: basic navigation sequence' covers store-level push/back/forward
Code review: AppSidebar handleSessionClick → navStore.push({view:'chat',sessionId}) (L64)
Code review: AppHeader openSettings → navStore.push({view:'settings', activeTab: navStore.getLastSettingsTab()}) (L101)
Code review: AppSidebar back/forward buttons → navStore.back()/forward() (L93-97)
Unit test 'AC-2: truncates forward branch on push' verified
Code review: navigation.ts push() L37-39 splice(pointer+1) truncates forward branch
Verify canGoForward=false after truncation push
Unit test 'updateCurrentTab replaces activeTab on settings entry' verified
Code review: SettingsView watcher on currentEntry with { immediate: true } restores activeTab
Code review: SettingsView tab click → navStore.updateCurrentTab(tab.key) syncs to stack
Unit test 'back pops last entry when pointer=0' verified
Code review: SettingsView ESC handler → navStore.back() (L26)
Code review: back() with pointer=0 → entries=[] pointer=-1 → currentView='chat'
Code review: AppSidebar L93 :disabled="!navStore.canGoBack"
Code review: AppSidebar L96 :disabled="!navStore.canGoForward"
Verify canGoBack=false on empty stack, canGoBack=true on single entry, canGoForward=false at end
Code review: SettingsView onMounted keydown handler (L20-28)
ESC key (e.key==='Escape') → check modal state → navStore.back()
Verify back() changes currentView from 'settings' to previous entry's view
Code review: SettingsView ESC handler checks querySelector('[data-modal-visible]') first (L22-24)
If modal found: early return, navStore.back() not called
Verify modal closes but Settings view remains
Code review: App.vue IPC shortcut handler (L251-255)
case 'settings': if navStore.currentView==='settings' → back(); else → push({view:'settings'})
From Chat: currentView='chat' → else branch → push Settings entry
Code review: App.vue IPC shortcut handler (L251-255)
case 'settings': if navStore.currentView==='settings' → navStore.back()
From Settings: currentView='settings' → if branch → back()
Unit test 'AC-4: caps at 50 entries, evicting oldest' verified
Push 51 entries → entries.length=50, pointer=49
Oldest entry s0 evicted, first entry is s1
Unit test 'updateCurrentTab replaces activeTab on settings entry' verified
Push Settings(providers) → updateCurrentTab('skills') → activeTab==='skills'
Object replacement ensures Vue reactivity detects change
Unit test 'getLastSettingsTab falls back to providers' verified
Stack with only Chat entries → getLastSettingsTab() returns 'providers'
Code review: navigation.ts has zero imports/references to panelStore
navStore only manages entries/pointer, never modifies panel tree
Navigation operations only change currentView which drives v-if rendering
Code review: AppSidebar handleSessionClick (L62-66)
switchSession(id) → openSessionSmart(id) → navStore.push({view:'chat',sessionId:id})
Settings entry remains in stack, back() can return to it
